text.title: performance-domains-overview Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for performance-domains-overview. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Assess all 8 domains in a single sitting; partial assessments are misleading.
rule.rationale: Domains are interdependent. Skipping domains creates a false picture and obscures causality across the system.

rule.statement: Anchor each color rating (green/yellow/red) with a quoted artifact (retro line, incident, missed milestone) — no vibes.
rule.rationale: Without evidence, assessments become opinion theater. Every rating must point to data.

rule.statement: Run the assessment on a fixed cadence (monthly) AND on triggers (incident, scope change, leadership change).
rule.rationale: Fixed cadence surfaces slow drift; trigger assessments catch sudden shifts.
